_comment: Phase C extension prompts — 300 new scripts authored 2026-04-28 to enrich the smoke-test corpus with non-trivial flows: perps (Hyperliquid/dYdX/GMX), LRT/restaking diversity (Ether.fi/Renzo/Kelp/Swell/Symbiotic/Karak), Pendle PT/YT, MEV protection, ERC-4337, governance, NFT actions, RWAs, advanced lending (Spark/Maple/Morpho-Blue/Notional/Ajna/Euler). Newcomer side adds trading-education, L2-education, AA-education, address-safety, signature-safety, wallet-safety. Build process: build_expert_matrix.py + build_newcomer_matrix.py read this file in addition to historical inputs.
